languages.text: "Ярмо... сколь примитивное название. И все же то, что было сказано о нем, вызывает любопытство. Тайное оружие, основанное на запретных знаниях и скованное совместными усилиями десятков и сотен людей, оставленных в неведении..." {n}Тразин удовлетворенно хмыкает.{/n} "Тебе следует найти эту вещь — я хотел бы взглянуть на нее поближе".

"The Yoke... Such a primitive name. And yet what has been said of it piques my curiosity. A secret weapon based on forbidden knowledge and forged by the joint efforts of dozens or even hundreds of people left in ignorance..." {n}Trazyn hums contentedly.{/n} "You should find this thing — I'd like to take a closer look at it."
languages.original_text: "Ярмо... сколь примитивное название. И все же то, что было сказано о нем, вызывает любопытство. Тайное оружие, основанное на запретных знаниях и скованное совместными усилиями десятков и сотен людей, оставленных в неведении..." {n}Тразин удовлетворенно хмыкает.{/n} "Тебе следует найти эту вещь — я хотел бы взглянуть на нее поближе".

languages.text: «El Yugo... Qué nombre más primitivo. Y, sin embargo, lo que he oído sobre él despierta mi curiosidad. Un arma secreta basada en conocimientos prohibidos, forjada por los esfuerzos conjuntos de decenas o cientos de personas sumidas en la ignorancia...». {n}Trazyn zumba, contento.{/n} «Deberías buscarlo. Quiero verlo de cerca».
languages.original_text: "The Yoke... Such a primitive name. And yet what has been said of it piques my curiosity. A secret weapon based on forbidden knowledge and forged by the joint efforts of dozens or even hundreds of people left in ignorance..." {n}Trazyn hums contentedly.{/n} "You should find this thing — I'd like to take a closer look at it."

Un arma secreta basada en conocimientos prohibidos, forjada por los esfuerzos conjuntos de decenas o cientos de personas sumidas en la ignorancia...». {n}Trazyn zumba, contento.{/n} «Deberías buscarlo. Quiero verlo de cerca».

languages.text: “‘圣枷’……多么原始的名字。不过，关于它的种种传闻倒是勾起了我的好奇心。一件基于禁忌知识、由几十乃至上百名无知凡人协力锻造的秘密武器……”{n}特拉金满足地轻哼着。{/n}“去把它找出来，我想好好端详一番。”
languages.original_text: "The Yoke... Such a primitive name. And yet what has been said of it piques my curiosity. A secret weapon based on forbidden knowledge and forged by the joint efforts of dozens or even hundreds of people left in ignorance..." {n}Trazyn hums contentedly.{/n} "You should find this thing — I'd like to take a closer look at it."

traits.locale_text: “‘圣枷’……多么原始的名字。不过，关于它的种种传闻倒是勾起了我的好奇心。一件基于禁忌知识、由几十乃至上百名无知凡人协力锻造的秘密武器……”{n}特拉金满足地轻哼着。{/n}“去把它找出来，我想好好端详一番。”

languages.text: « Le Joug... Quel nom primitif. Pour autant, je dois admettre que l'idée d'une arme secrète fondée sur un savoir interdit et forgée grâce aux efforts conjoints de dizaines voire de centaines de personnes maintenues dans l'ignorance a piqué ma curiosité. » {n}Trazyn fredonne d'un air satisfait.{/n} « Vous devriez vous lancer à sa recherche. J'aimerais bien l'examiner de plus près. »
languages.original_text: "The Yoke... Such a primitive name. And yet what has been said of it piques my curiosity. A secret weapon based on forbidden knowledge and forged by the joint efforts of dozens or even hundreds of people left in ignorance..." {n}Trazyn hums contentedly.{/n} "You should find this thing — I'd like to take a closer look at it."

J'aimerais bien l'examiner de plus près. »

languages.text: "Boyunduruk... Ne kadar ilkel bir isim. Yine de hakkında söylenenler merakımı cezbediyor. Yasaklı irfana dayanan ve cehalet içinde bırakılan onlarca, hatta yüzlerce insanın ortak çabasıyla dövülmüş gizli bir silah..." {n}Trazyn memnuniyetle mırıldanıyor.{/n} "Bu şeyi bulacak olursan... Ona yakından bakmak isterim."
languages.original_text: "The Yoke... Such a primitive name. And yet what has been said of it piques my curiosity. A secret weapon based on forbidden knowledge and forged by the joint efforts of dozens or even hundreds of people left in ignorance..." {n}Trazyn hums contentedly.{/n} "You should find this thing — I'd like to take a closer look at it."

traits.locale_text: "Boyunduruk... Ne kadar ilkel bir isim. Yine de hakkında söylenenler merakımı cezbediyor. Yasaklı irfana dayanan ve cehalet içinde bırakılan onlarca, hatta yüzlerce insanın ortak çabasıyla dövülmüş gizli bir silah..." {n}Trazyn memnuniyetle mırıldanıyor.{/n} "Bu şeyi bulacak olursan... Ona yakından bakmak isterim."

languages.text: "Das Joch. Was für ein primitiver Name. Und doch wecken die Geschichten darüber meine Neugier. Eine auf verbotenem Wissen basierende Geheimwaffe, geschmiedet von den gemeinsamen Bemühungen Dutzender oder Hunderter unwissender Seelen ..." {n}Trazyn summt zufrieden.{/n} "Du solltest dieses Ding finden — ich würde es gerne aus der Nähe betrachten."
languages.original_text: "The Yoke... Such a primitive name. And yet what has been said of it piques my curiosity. A secret weapon based on forbidden knowledge and forged by the joint efforts of dozens or even hundreds of people left in ignorance..." {n}Trazyn hums contentedly.{/n} "You should find this thing — I'd like to take a closer look at it."

Eine auf verbotenem Wissen basierende Geheimwaffe, geschmiedet von den gemeinsamen Bemühungen Dutzender oder Hunderter unwissender Seelen ..." {n}Trazyn summt zufrieden.{/n} "Du solltest dieses Ding finden — ich würde es gerne aus der Nähe betrachten."

languages.text: 「ヨーク...原始的な名前だ。しかし、それについて語られることは、私の好奇心を刺激する。禁断の知識に基づく秘密兵器で、無知のまま放置された何十、何百もの人々の共同作業によって鍛え上げられた......」。{n}トラジンは満足そうにハミングする。{/n}"これを見つけるべきだ。よく見てみたい。"
languages.original_text: "The Yoke... Such a primitive name. And yet what has been said of it piques my curiosity. A secret weapon based on forbidden knowledge and forged by the joint efforts of dozens or even hundreds of people left in ignorance..." {n}Trazyn hums contentedly.{/n} "You should find this thing — I'd like to take a closer look at it."
